summary: Completed retest of EduFlow Expo web app after fixes. All 3 previously reported bugs are now FIXED: (1) Logout redirect works from both Settings and Profile, (2) Wallet top-up immediately updates balance via optimistic update, (3) Food Court cart bar is visible and positioned correctly above tab bar. All 3 demo accounts login successfully.

issues: Layout children must be of type Screen warnings (expo-router 5.x) - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality
shadow* style props deprecated warnings - cosmetic

Missing route warnings for HOD (department, exams, performance) and Admin (departments, finance, analytics) - these routes are referenced somewhere but don't exist as files. Tabs display correctly though.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate source of missing route warnings for HOD/Admin tabs (department, exams, performance, departments, finance, analytics) - functionality works but console shows warnings
OPTIONAL: Update deprecated shadow* and pointerEvents style props to modern equivalents
critical_code_review_comments: routeConfig.ts is clean and only lists implemented screens
_layout.tsx correctly uses <Redirect href='/login' /> for logout flow
wallet.tsx correctly implements optimistic updates with walletOverride/txOverride state
food-court.tsx cart bar positioned at bottom:96px (above 80px tab bar) - working correctly
data-testid attributes not rendering in React Native Web DOM - may need testID prop instead for RN components
seed_data_creation: None - using existing mock JSON data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs from iteration_1 are fixed. App is frontend-only with axios-mock-adapter. Login works for all 3 roles. Logout redirect works from both Settings and Profile pages. Wallet top-up updates balance immediately. Food Court cart bar appears after adding items and is positioned above tab bar. Order placement shows success toast and clears cart. Console warnings about missing routes are cosmetic - actual tabs display correctly.
tests_passed: Wallet top-up prepends new credit transaction
Food Court menu displays with categories and items
Add to cart shows quantity controls and cart bar
Cart bar positioned above tab bar (bottom: 96px)
Place order shows success toast with order ID
Student tabs: Dashboard, Profile, Notifications, Settings, Attendance, Marks, Food Court, Wallet
HOD tabs: Dashboard, Profile, Notifications, Settings, Attendance (no department/exams/performance)
Admin tabs: Dashboard, Profile, Notifications, Settings, Users (no departments/finance/analytics)
mocked_api_note: ENTIRE API LAYER IS MOCKED via axios-mock-adapter + JSON seeds. This is by design (frontend-only preview). No backend exists.
